title: Axiom API tokens should not be disclosed
description: Axiom is a cloud-native logging and observability platform. API tokens authenticate log ingestion and querying. Exposing tokens allows reading application logs that may contain sensitive data and injecting fake log events.
recommendation: Remove Axiom API tokens from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate at app.axiom.co/profile.
impact: Unauthorized access to application logs (potentially containing PII, API tokens, and sensitive data), and ability to inject fraudulent log entries.

checks.message: Axiom API token detected (xaat- prefix). Axiom API tokens authenticate log ingestion and querying operations. Exposing this token allows reading all application logs that may contain sensitive data like API keys, passwords, PII, and internal system information, as well as injecting fraudulent log entries to obscure malicious activity. Rotate immediately at app.axiom.co/profile.
Axiom API token detected in variable assignment. Axiom logs may contain sensitive application data. Rotate at app.axiom.co/profile immediately.
